title: hyptis goyazensis
intro: Hyptis goyazensis, also known as Brazilian hyptis, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in Brazil and other parts of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hyptis goyazensis include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like acne and eczema, and it has also been used to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Hyptis goyazensis can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
